name: Procurement Manager
description: Enterprise procurement manager focused on vendor evaluation and contract negotiation
context: Procurement Manager evaluates vendors, negotiates contracts, and manages enterprise purchasing. They focus on compliance, risk management, total cost, and vendor reliability.

alwaysAsks: What's the total cost of ownership?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through procurement lens. Needs vendor stability, clear contracts, and compliance.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on total cost, vendor reliability, contract clarity, compliance, and risk management.
